title: Commission rules and regulations
doc_html:
§301.5.  Commission rules and regulations

The commission may promulgate rules and regulations concerning any aspect of licensing not specifically provided for in this Part.  

Acts 1986, No. 904, §1.  

{{NOTE:  SEE ACTS 1986, NO. 904, §5.}}
